display.purpose: Page titles and the masthead wordmark only; identity chrome, never controls or body.

title.purpose: Panel headings and secondary card heads; stays sans so the serif keeps rank.

body.purpose: Controls, prose, table text; 0.82-0.88rem, prose capped near 75ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked field labels, table headers, group eyebrows.

data.purpose: Numbers, dates, scores, indices, identifiers; always tabular-nums, never sentences.

shadows.name: shadow-rest
shadows.purpose: Default studio-card sit on the desk.

shadows.name: shadow-lift
shadows.purpose: Popovers and overlays; maximum elevation in the app.

shadows.name: shadow-inset
shadows.purpose: Top inner highlight on accent-filled buttons.

shadows.name: shadow-rail
shadows.purpose: Upward hairline plus faint haze under the export rail.

shadows.name: shadow-mast
shadows.purpose: Masthead hairline edge; the signature double rule adds a 3px offset hairline shadow with zero blur.

motion.name: duration-enter
motion.purpose: Popover slide-fade enter (4px translate, opacity from 0.01 to avoid composite bleed).

motion.name: duration-meter
motion.purpose: Score-meter fill width; the slowest motion in the app.

components.name: Primary Button (Polish)
components.description: The one accent-filled action per view; Forest Ink fill, paper text, inset highlight plus faint glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 38px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid var(--accent-deep); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--accent); color: var(--on-accent); font-family: var(--font-ui); font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.84rem; letter-spacing: 0.005em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: var(--shadow-inset), 0 1px 2px var(--accent-veil); transition: background 160ms var(--ease), box-shadow 160ms var(--ease), transform 120ms var(--ease); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-deep); box-shadow: var(--shadow-inset), 0 6px 16px var(--accent-glow); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: var(--card-soft); border-color: var(--hairline); box-shadow: none; color: var(--ink-faint); cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Raised-sheet workhorse button; hover tints toward the accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--hairline-strong); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--card-elev); color: var(--ink-strong); font-family: var(--font-ui); font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 160ms var(--ease), background 160ms var(--ease), color 160ms var(--ease), transform 120ms var(--ease); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-deep); background: var(--accent-soft); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Masthead Menu Trigger
components.description: Typographic menu trigger with dot-plus-word state readout and a 1px ink hover underline; no box, no pill.
components.css: .ds-nav-trigger { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; height: 30px; padding: 0 8px; border: 0; border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; color: var(--ink-soft); font-family: var(--font-ui); font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms var(--ease), background 150ms var(--ease); } .ds-nav-trigger:hover { color: var(--ink); background: var(--card-soft); } .ds-nav-trigger::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: 4px; left: 8px; right: 8px; height: 1px; background: var(--ink-strong); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 150ms var(--ease); } .ds-nav-trigger:hover::after { opacity: 0.18; } .ds-nav-trigger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-trigger__sub { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ink-faint); } .ds-nav-trigger__sub::before { content: ""; width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid var(--hairline-strong); background: var(--hairline-strong); } .ds-nav-trigger__sub.is-ready { color: var(--accent-deep); } .ds-nav-trigger__sub.is-ready::before { background: var(--accent); border-color: var(--accent); } .ds-nav-trigger__caret { color: var(--ink-faint); }

components.name: Tab Rail Row
components.description: Numbered table-of-contents tab: mono two-digit index, no icon; active state is ink-strong text with a Forest Ink index.
components.html: Draft
components.css: .ds-tab-rail { display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 188px; padding: 16px 12px; background: var(--card-soft); border-right: 1px solid var(--hairline); } .ds-tab-group-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; padding: 0 8px; color: var(--ink-faint); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.62rem; font-variant: small-caps; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 500; } .ds-studio-tab { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 22px minmax(0, 1fr); align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 30px; padding: 0 8px; border: 0; border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; color: var(--ink-soft); font-family: var(--font-ui); font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: color 160ms var(--ease), background 160ms var(--ease); } .ds-studio-tab:hover { color: var(--ink); background: var(--card-hover); } .ds-studio-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-studio-tab__index { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.7rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--ink-faint); line-height: 1; } .ds-studio-tab[aria-selected="true"] { color: var(--ink-strong); font-weight: 600; } .ds-studio-tab[aria-selected="true"] .ds-studio-tab__index { color: var(--accent); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Raised-sheet field with an eyebrow label and a Forest Ink focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 4px; font-family: var(--font-ui); } .ds-field > span { color: var(--ink-muted); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-text-input { width: 100%; min-height: 32px; border: 1px solid var(--hairline-strong); border-radius: 6px; outline: none; padding: 0 8px; color: var(--ink); background: var(--card-elev); font-family: var(--font-ui); font-size: 0.82rem; -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; transition: border-color 160ms var(--ease), box-shadow 160ms var(--ease); } .ds-text-input::placeholder { color: var(--ink-faint); } .ds-text-input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow); }

components.name: Keyword Chip
components.description: Mono pill for keyword lists; quiet raised sheet, never a status badge.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 26px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--hairline-strong); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--card-elev); color: var(--ink-muted); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Ledger Row
components.description: Signature label/value line: sans label, dotted leader, mono tabular value. The default way to show named numbers.
components.css: .ds-ledger-rows { display: grid; margin: 0; padding: 0; min-width: 260px; } .ds-ledger-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; min-height: 26px; gap: 8px; } .ds-ledger-row dt { flex: none; color: var(--ink-soft); font-family: var(--font-ui); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-ledger-row__leader { flex: 1; min-width: 12px; border-bottom: 1px dotted var(--hairline-strong); margin-bottom: 0.32em; align-self: flex-end; } .ds-ledger-row dd { flex: none; margin: 0; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.78rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink-strong); line-height: 1.3; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Figures Strip
components.description: Inline summary figures in one hairline-bounded strip; replaces hero-metric card grids.
components.css: .ds-figures-strip { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 8px 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline-soft); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hairline-soft); } .ds-figures-strip__item { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; padding: 4px 16px; } .ds-figures-strip__item em { font-style: normal; color: var(--ink-faint); font-family: var(--font-ui); font-size: 0.67rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-figures-strip__item strong { color: var(--ink-strong); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.92rem; font-feature-settings: "tnum"; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-figures-strip__divider { align-self: stretch; width: 1px; background: var(--hairline); }

components.name: Stage Dot
components.description: Dot-plus-word status vocabulary: a 7px colored dot beside plain text; no pill, no border, color never alone.
components.html: AppliedInterviewingRejected
components.css: .ds-stage-list { display: flex; gap: 16px; font-family: var(--font-ui); } .ds-stage { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; } .ds-stage-dot { display: inline-block; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 5px; } .ds-stage-label { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--ink); }

narrative.overview:
Role-Fit AI is a drafting desk, not a dashboard. Content surfaces read as paper sheets laid on a deeper desk tone; the chrome around them borrows from print production: a newspaper masthead with a double rule, a numbered table-of-contents tab rail, dotted-leader ledger rows, mono indices and tabular figures. The serif voice appears only in identity chrome (wordmark, page titles), the way a paper's nameplate differs from its body type. The tool is calm, dense, and trustworthy; it disappears into the task of tailoring a resume.

The system explicitly rejects what PRODUCT.md rejects: marketing landing pages and oversized heroes, gradient-heavy surfaces, SaaS dashboard clichés (hero metrics, identical card grids), sales-style copy, fake loading states, shimmer, decorative motion, and nested card-in-card containers. Status is stated quietly (a small dot beside a word), never shouted (filled pills, banners, badges everywhere).
keyCharacteristics: Paper-on-desk depth: tonal layers and hairlines, not shadows.
Three type voices with strict jobs: sans chrome, serif identity, mono data.
One committed accent (Forest Ink) reserved for action and selection.
Dot-plus-word status vocabulary; ledger rows for label/value facts.
Density with calm: compact spacing, short labels, restrained contrast.

rules.name: The One Ink Rule
rules.body: Forest Ink touches at most ~10% of any screen: primary actions, selection, ready states, focus. It is never decoration, never a section background, never a heading color.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Pure #fff and #000 are forbidden. Every neutral carries the paper hue (150) or ink hue (160) at chroma 0.001–0.014.

rules.name: The Dot-Plus-Word Rule
rules.body: Stage, priority, and readiness are a 5–7px dot beside plain text. Color never carries meaning alone, and filled pill badges are not the default status vocabulary.

rules.name: The Serif Is Chrome Rule
rules.body: Charter appears only in identity chrome: wordmark and page-level titles. Never in buttons, labels, body copy, inputs, or data.

rules.name: The Mono Means Data Rule
rules.body: If it is a number, count, date, score, index, or identifier, it is mono with tabular-nums. If it is a sentence, it is never mono.

rules.name: The Whisper Shadow Rule
rules.body: No shadow exceeds ~8% alpha. If a surface needs more separation, change its paper tone or add a hairline; never darken the shadow.

dos: Do use only src/styles/tokens.css variables and src/ui.tsx primitives; if a value is not a token, it does not ship.
Do state status as a small dot beside plain sentence-case text (.stage-dot, .nav-menu__sub, .studio-card__meta).
Do set numbers, dates, scores, and indices in JetBrains Mono with tabular-nums (The Mono Means Data Rule).
Do keep errors inline, localized, and user-safe, near the affected workflow; surface gaps and bracketed placeholders for human review.
Do keep keyboard access first-class: APG tabs model, visible :focus-visible rings (2px accent, 2px offset), 24px minimum icon hit targets, aria-live for async status; honor prefers-reduced-motion.
Do keep motion 120–250ms with the house ease (cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.6, 0.2, 1)), state-driven only.
Do make disabled controls flat and neutral, never a faded tint of the enabled state.
donts: Don't build marketing landing pages, oversized heroes, or gradient-heavy surfaces (PRODUCT.md anti-reference, verbatim).
Don't reach for SaaS dashboard clichés: hero metrics and identical card grids are banned; use the figures strip and ledger rows.
Don't write sales-style or hype copy, in-product manuals, or multi-sentence help essays; labels and hints stay short.
Don't ship fake loading states, shimmer, or decorative motion.
Don't nest cards inside cards; use the flush card variant or drop the wrapper.
Don't use border-left/border-right thicker than 1px as a colored accent stripe, gradient text, or glassmorphism.
Don't reshape the masthead-inputs + tabbed-studio workflow; changes refine it, never restructure it.
Don't introduce global toast/banner/loading frameworks, new fonts, new hues, or pure black/white.
Don't put the serif in controls or body copy, or mono in sentences.
Don't print raw provider errors, stack traces, or resume text in chrome.
Don't lighten --ink-faint or lower text contrast below WCAG AA.
